About Me

Turning raw data into clear decisions

I'm a BI Developer and Data Analyst based in Giza, Egypt, with a Bachelor's in Computer Science from Cairo University. Currently gaining hands-on experience as a Business Intelligence Intern at the Egyptian Food Bank, where I work with the Microsoft Power Platform at scale.

My passion lies at the intersection of engineering and storytelling — taking thousands of rows of messy data and extracting the one insight that changes how a business operates. I build dashboards executives actually use, not just ones that look nice.

From designing Medallion Architecture ETL pipelines to building drag-and-drop Power Apps for order management, I bring both the technical depth and the design sensibility needed to deliver complete, production-ready solutions.

Cairo University CS Graduate Power Platform Expert Dashboard UI/UX Design Large-Scale Data Engineering

Portfolio

Featured projects

Real work. Real data. Real impact.

Power BI DAX
‹
›
Voucher Distribution & Utilization Dashboard
High-performance Power BI dashboard processing 1M+ records per month for 900K+ customers at the Egyptian Food Bank. Features Dark/Light mode toggle, regional performance analysis, and family-level distribution tracking across all Egyptian governorates.
1M+ Records/Month 900K Customers 15+ DAX Measures 99.60% Utilization Rate
Power BI DAX Star Schema SharePoint
GitHub →
Power BI Financial
‹
›
Revenue Margin & Financial Analytics
Comprehensive financial analytics system analyzing 145K+ transactional records. Delivers executive-level reporting with YoY/MoM growth tracking, gross margin analysis, Dark/Light mode, custom tooltips, and deep-dive filtering by team, supplier, and category.
145K+ Transactions $9.68M Revenue 35+ KPI Measures YoY & MoM Growth
Power BI DAX Power Query
GitHub →
Power Apps Automate
‹
›
Restaurant POS & Automation System
End-to-end digital point-of-sale application built in Power Apps with dynamic pricing (half/full sandwich options), real-time order calculation, automated invoice generation via Power Automate, and email receipt delivery. SharePoint backend for scalable order history.
Real-Time Pricing Auto Invoice Email SharePoint Backend Zero Manual Entry
Power Apps Power Automate SharePoint
GitHub →
SQL Server ETL
‹
›
Data Warehouse & ETL Pipeline
Enterprise-grade data warehouse built using Medallion Architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold layers) integrating CRM and ERP data sources. Features automated ETL pipelines for data cleansing, transformation, and integrity validation ensuring reliable downstream BI consumption.
Medallion Architecture CRM + ERP Integration Automated ETL Data Quality Gates
SQL Server T-SQL ETL

Services

What I can build for you

📊
Power BI Dashboard Development
Executive-level interactive dashboards with advanced DAX measures, custom tooltips, and mobile-responsive design. Dark/Light mode included.
🗄️
SQL Data Analysis & Engineering
Data warehouse design, ETL pipeline development, query optimization, and Medallion Architecture implementation for scalable analytics.
🐍
Python Data Analysis
Exploratory data analysis, automated reporting, statistical insights, and data visualization using Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and Seaborn.
⚙️
Business Process Automation
End-to-end workflow automation using Power Automate and Power Apps — eliminating manual work, reducing errors, and saving operational time.
📈
KPI Architecture & Reporting
Define, design, and implement KPI frameworks. Turn vague business goals into measurable metrics tracked in real-time dashboards.
🧹
Data Cleaning & Transformation
Transform raw, inconsistent data into analysis-ready datasets. Power Query, SQL, and Python used to standardize and validate data at scale.
